curation_notes: Patch commit 369e557 adds an assert!(index <= len) bounds check to the default Vector::insert method in src/vector.rs before the unsafe pointer write. Only one source file was modified. The pre-assigned class buffer-overflow (CWE-787 Out-of-bounds Write) is correct — the vulnerability allows writing past the allocated buffer via an unchecked index. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern as the fix is in a trait default method.
